title: Alex's Cobblemon Caves
description: Adds custom Cobblemon spawns to Alex's Caves
body:
## Due to Cobblemon 1.6 being in 1.21.1, this datapack will not update unless Alex's Caves is ported to 1.21.1, otherwise this pack only works with Cobblemon 1.5.2 - 1.4

Adds various custom cobblemon spawns to alex's caves. Full list of additions seen below, any marked with no model are still implemented but must be manually moved out of the _no current model_ folder to be used, intended for use with datapacks or cobblemon updates. Also note that forlorn hollows and abyssal chasm partially uses default tables, whereas the other biomes should exclusively use pokemon listed here.



## Spawns

**candy:**
munchlax/snorlax,
bounsweet,
milcery/alcremie,
fidough/dachsbun,
nacli/naclstack/garganacl
**(no model)**
cherubi,
vanillite/vanillish/vanilluxe,
swirlix/slurpuff,
appletun/dipplin/hydrapple,
sinistea/sinistcha

**toxic:**
koffing/weezing,
paldaean wooper/clodsire,
poipole/naganadel (ultra rare),
ferroseed/ferrothorn,
gligar/gliscor,
trapinch/vibrava/flygon
**(no model)**
alolan grimer/muk,
trubbish/garbador,
toxel/toxtricity,
croagunk/toxicroak,
grubbin/chargabug/vikavolt,
solosis/duosion/reuniclus

**forlorn:**
cubone,
shedninja,
spiritomb,
gimmighoul (both forms),
stonjourner,
hisuian zorua/zoarark
**(no model)**
alolan marowak

**primordial:**
bulbasaur/ivysaur/venusaur,
bellsprout/weepinbell/victreebell,
kabuto/kabutops,
aerodactyl,
lileep/cradily,
anorith/armaldo,
craniados/rampardos,
shieldon/bastiodon,
carnivine,
tyrunt/tyrantrum,
amaura/aurorus,
tirtouga/carracosta,
dracovish,
dracozolt,
arctovish,
arctozolt,
omanyte/omastar,
archen/archaeops,
slugma/magcargo

**magnetic:**
porygon/porygon2/porygonz,
nosepass/probopass,
beldum/metang/metagross,
magnemite/magneton/magnezone,
roggenrola/boldore/gigalith,
klink/klang/klinklang,
carbink
**(no model)**
alolan geodude/graveler/golem,
sandy shocks (ultra rare),
iron thorns (ultra rare),
meltan/melmetal (ultra rare),
togedemaru,
morpeko

**abyss:**
hisuian quilfish/overqwil,
relicanth,
dhelmise,
gyarados,
frillish/jellicent,
wishiwashi,
sharpedo
**(no model)**
kyogre (ultra rare)
